stock_market.summary: End of Q1 sees market consolidation. Investors are closely watching upcoming interest rate signals for Q2. The tech sector, particularly AI-driven hardware, remains resilient.

art_market.summary: Q1 auction activity concludes with solid performance. Demand for post-war contemporary works remains strong as we enter the spring art fair season.

key_metrics.major_events: Strong performance in blue-chip auctions, spring fair anticipation
